mapper.update: UPDATE ing_outbox_message SET status_code = 'PUBLISHING', pub_lease_owner = #{leaseOwner}, pub_leased_until = #{leaseExpireAt}, updated_at = NOW(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status_code IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND ( (#{expectedVersion} IS NULL AND version IS NULL) OR version = #{expectedVersion} )

UPDATE ing_outbox_message SET status_code = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = NOW(6), pub_lease_owner = NULL, pub_leased_until = NULL, error_code = NULL, error_msg = NULL, next_retry_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status_code = 'PUBLISHING' AND ( (#{expectedVersion} IS NULL AND version IS NULL) OR version = #{expectedVersion} )

UPDATE ing_outbox_message SET status_code = 'FAILED', retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, pub_lease_owner = NULL, pub_leased_until = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status_code = 'PUBLISHING' AND ( (#{expectedVersion} IS NULL AND version IS NULL) OR version = #{expectedVersion} )

UPDATE ing_outbox_message SET status_code = 'DEAD', retry_count = #{retryCount}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, next_retry_at = NULL, pub_lease_owner = NULL, pub_leased_until = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status_code = 'PUBLISHING' AND ( (#{expectedVersion} IS NULL AND version IS NULL) OR version = #{expectedVersion} )
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ing_outbox_message ( aggregate_type, aggregate_id, channel, op_type, partition_key, dedup_key, payload_json, headers_json, not_before, status_code, retry_count, created_at, updated_at, version ) VALUES
( #{msg.aggregateType}, #{msg.aggregateId}, #{msg.channel}, #{msg.opType}, #{msg.partitionKey}, #{msg.dedupKey}, #{msg.payloadJson}, #{msg.headersJson}, #{msg.notBefore}, 'PENDING', 0, NOW(6), NOW(6), 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE payload_json = VALUES(payload_json), headers_json = VALUES(headers_json), not_before = VALUES(not_before), status_code = 'PENDING', retry_count = 0, next_retry_at = NULL, error_code = NULL, error_msg = NULL, pub_lease_owner = NULL, pub_leased_until = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6), version = version + 1
